UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Information about a registered customer profile, including credentials and personal wishlist curation.

id.description: The unique firebase authentication UID of the user.

wishlist.description: Array of product ID strings representing the user's wishlisted items.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Details of safe transactions completed under curations checkout points.

id.description: The unique checkout invoice reference id.

userId.description: Uniquely maps order back to the specific authenticating account.

items.description: List of purchased cart items and their quantities.

subtotal.description: The initial cost sum of order lines.

shipping.description: The computed cost of express transport.

total.description: Final amount debited via checkout credentials.

shippingAddress.description: Physical destination details for parcel shipment.

date.description: The serial timestamp when logistics cleared.

/users/{userId}.description: Users profile metadata collection mapped to auth UID.

/users/{userId}/orders/{orderId}.description: Collection of transactional receipts associated with the specified customer profile.
